title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA), ServiceNow to Up Workflow Visibility
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) and ServiceNow's partnership to allow organizations to manage and keep track of the lifecycle, location, state and movement of their physical assets.

title: Zebra Technologies' MotionWorks Enterprise Integrates with ServiceNow to Improve Workflow Visibility
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies' MotionWorks Enterprise integrates with ServiceNow to improve workflow visibility.

title: Bespoke Selects Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) Automation Solution
text: Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) Fetch autonomous mobile robots and fixed industrial scanners will enable Bespoke to enhance its workflow visibility and optimise the human capital.

title: Bespoke Manufacturing Company (BMC) Selects Zebra's Industrial and Robotics Automation to Increase Efficiency
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Bespoke Manufacturing Company (BMC) selects Zebra's Industrial and Robotics Automation to increase efficiency.

title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Down 50.6% YTD: What's Hurting It?
text: Supply-chain disturbances and freight cost woes are hurting Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) operations. Unfavorable foreign-currency movements are an added concern.

title: Zebra (ZBRA) Down 7.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Zebra (ZBRA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
